name: Masalewali Alu Mattar Khumben
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat ghee in a large pot.
2. Add onion and garlic; fry until browned.
3. Stir in ginger and fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add garam masala, turmeric, and chili; stir for a minute.
5. Stir in potatoes, salt, and water. Mix well and bring to a boil.
6. Simmer for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Add mushrooms and peas; continue cooking, covered, for 5 to 8 minutes.
8. Remove the lid, raise the heat, and cook until three-quarters of the water has evaporated.
9. Serve with dal.
Rani, "Feast of India"
